title: koeleria pyramidata subsp. eriostachya
intro: Koeleria pyramidata subsp. eriostachya, also known as the alpine koeleria, is a perennial grass species native to mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The alpine koeleria is said to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, often combined with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
